response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with scalable systems, distributed architectures, and full-stack development, including telemetry and experimentation-related projects. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development and embedded systems, with limited direct experience in AI-first growth experimentation platforms or enterprise-scale measurement systems. His recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and pricing optimization rather than experimentation frameworks.
strengths: Strong background in scalable systems and distributed architectures (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to design and ship systemic solutions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq)
Technical leadership and mentorship experience (e.g., organizing workshops, TDD/pairing practices at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited direct experience with experimentation/feature-flagging platforms or growth measurement systems
No explicit mention of statistical methods or experimental analysis in resume (e.g., A/B testing, bias detection)
Recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and pricing optimization rather than growth experimentation
